channel.title: KoreLogic Security — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by KoreLogic Security (korelogic).

item.title: CVE-2025-15464 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — KL-001-2026-01: yintibao Fun Print Mobile Unauthorized Access via Context Hijacking
item.description: Exported Activity allows external applications to gain application context and directly launch Gmail with inbox access, bypassing security controls.

item.title: CVE-2025-54769 · 8.8 HIGH — KL-001-2025-016: Xorux LPAR2RRD File Upload Directory Traversal
item.description: An authenticated, read-only user can upload a file and perform a directory traversal to have the uploaded file placed in a location of their choosing. This can be used to overwrite existing PERL modules within the application to achieve remote code e…

item.title: CVE-2025-54768 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — KL-001-2025-015: Xorux LPAR2RRD Read Only User Log Download Exposing Sensitive Information
item.description: An API endpoint that should be limited to web application administrators is hidden from, but accessible by, lower-level read only web application users. The endpoint can be used to download logs from the appliance configuration, exposing sensitive in…

item.title: CVE-2025-54767 · 6.5 MEDIUM — KL-001-2025-014: Xorux LPAR2RRD Read Only User Denial of Service
item.description: An authenticated, read-only user can kill any processes running on the Xormon Original virtual appliance as the lpar2rrd user.

item.title: CVE-2025-54765 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — KL-001-2025-013: Xorux XorMon-NG Web Application Privilege Escalation to Administrator
item.description: An API endpoint that should be limited to web application administrators is hidden from, but accessible by, lower-level read only web application users. The endpoint can be used to import the appliance configuration, allowing an attacker to control t…

item.title: CVE-2025-54766 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — KL-001-2025-012: Xorux XorMon-NG Read Only User Export Device Configuration Exposing Sensitive Information
item.description: An API endpoint that should be limited to web application administrators is hidden from, but accessible by, lower-level read only web application users. The endpoint can be used to export the appliance configuration, exposing sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2025-5100 · 8 HIGH — KL-001-2025-005: Mobile Dynamix PrinterShare Mobile Print Double-Free Memory Write
item.description: A double-free condition occurs during the cleanup of temporary image files, which can be exploited to achieve memory corruption and potentially arbitrary code execution.

item.title: CVE-2025-5098 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — KL-001-2025-003: Mobile Dynamix PrinterShare Mobile Print Gmail Oauth Token Disclosure
item.description: PrinterShare Android application allows the capture of Gmail authentication tokens that can be reused to access a user's Gmail account without proper authorization.

item.title: CVE-2025-5099 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — KL-001-2025-004: Mobile Dynamix PrinterShare Mobile Print Out-of-bounds Write
item.description: An Out of Bounds Write occurs when the native library attempts PDF rendering, which can be exploited to achieve memory corruption and potentially arbitrary code execution.

item.title: CVE-2024-13722 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Checkmk NagVis Reflected Cross-site Scripting
item.description: The "NagVis" component within Checkmk is vulnerable to reflected cross-site scripting. An attacker can craft a malicious link that will execute arbitrary JavaScript in the context of the browser once clicked. The attack can be performed on both authe…

item.title: CVE-2024-13723 · 7.2 HIGH — Checkmk NagVis Remote Code Execution
item.description: The "NagVis" component within Checkmk is vulnerable to remote code execution. An authenticated attacker with administrative level privileges is able to upload a malicious PHP file and modify specific settings to execute the contents of the file as PH…

item.title: CVE-2024-8504 · 8.8 HIGH — VICIdial Authenticated Remote Code Execution
item.description: An attacker with authenticated access to VICIdial as an "agent" can execute arbitrary shell commands as the "root" user. This attack can be chained with CVE-2024-8503 to execute arbitrary shell commands starting from an unauthenticated perspective.

item.title: CVE-2024-8503 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — VICIdial Unauthenticated SQL Injection
item.description: An unauthenticated attacker can leverage a time-based SQL injection vulnerability in VICIdial to enumerate database records. By default, VICIdial stores plaintext credentials within the database.

item.title: CVE-2024-6893 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Journyx Unauthenticated XML External Entities Injection
item.description: The "soap_cgi.pyc" API handler allows the XML body of SOAP requests to contain references to external entities. This allows an unauthenticated attacker to read local files, perform server-side request forgery, and overwhelm the web server resources.

item.title: CVE-2024-6892 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Journyx Reflected Cross Site Scripting
item.description: Attackers can craft a malicious link that once clicked will execute arbitrary JavaScript in the context of the Journyx web application.

item.title: CVE-2024-6891 · 8.8 HIGH — Journyx Authenticated Remote Code Execution
item.description: Attackers with a valid username and password can exploit a python code injection vulnerability during the natural login flow.

item.title: CVE-2024-6890 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Journyx Unauthenticated Password Reset Bruteforce
item.description: Password reset tokens are generated using an insecure source of randomness. Attackers who know the username of the Journyx installation user can bruteforce the password reset and change the administrator password.

item.title: CVE-2024-6707 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Open WebUI Arbitrary File Upload + Path Traversal
item.description: Attacker controlled files can be uploaded to arbitrary locations on the web server's filesystem by abusing a path traversal vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2024-6706 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Open WebUI Stored Cross-Site Scripting
item.description: Attackers can craft a malicious prompt that coerces the language model into executing arbitrary JavaScript in the context of the web page.
